title: Workpack Project Configuration
description: Optional repository-level configuration for workpack tooling behavior.

workpackDir.description: Relative path to the workpacks directory.

verifyCommands.description: Optional project-specific command overrides used by verification tooling.

build.description: Build command executed by project verification flows.

test.description: Test command executed by project verification flows.

lint.description: Lint command executed by project verification flows.

protocolVersion.description: Protocol policy value in semantic version format.

strictMode.description: When true, tools should enforce stricter validation behavior.

roots.description: Additional roots to scan for workpacks.
